subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Thy letter hath come before Mine eyes and been perused. Render thou praise unto the Beloved, that the sweet fragrances of His loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی نامه ات بین یدی حاضر و ملاحظه شد حمد کن محبوب را که نفحات عنایتش از
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
